channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I’m Changxiu Ji (Leo) 👋 I’m a CS student with deep interests in AI, ML systems, and quantitative research. This blog — Leo’s Hotpot 🍲 — is where I share ideas, research findings, and things I find worth thinking about. Like a good hotpot: mixed, spicy, and hopefully interesting. What I write about AI/ML research and systems Software engineering insights Quantitative analysis Things I find surprising or counterintuitive Find me GitHub: nuglifeleoji LinkedIn: Changxiu Ji
